title: START_STICKY restart: startForeground() never called
description: Trigger: Android OS kills NieForegroundService under memory pressure and restarts it (START_STICKY behavior). onStartCommand() is called with intent=null. The when(intent?.action) dispatch has no null branch, so neither ACTION_START nor ACTION_STOP runs — startForeground() is never called. The service wakes up (wakeLock acquired in onCreate), but runs as an unprovisioned background service. Android 8+ kills background services after a few minutes, so the keepalive effect is lost until the user opens the app again. The comment says 'restart it with ACTION_START' which is wrong — START_STICKY delivers null, not the last intent. Fix: add a null branch that calls startForeground(), or switch to START_REDELIVER_INTENT.
